detect_git_info: detect git repo info including branch name, repo name, and dirty status for a directory
shorten_model_id: shorten a model ID string by stripping the provider prefix before the slash
print_startup_banner: print a startup banner showing coder version, model, provider, working directory, and git branch
print_session_info: print session details including session ID, title, message count, turns, tokens, and model info
print_token_cost: print session token usage statistics including total tokens, context window size, and utilization percentage
